description.unified: Engraves a sigil on [the target->2 enemy], dealing P.DMG and reducing P.DEF by [50%->20%] for [8 sec->5sec]. This skill gains an additional 500 DEF Penetration, and DMG increases by up to 200% based on the target’s missing HP.
Restores HP to all allies, then additionally restores HP every 0.8sec for 4sec, and [(added) reduces P.DMG taken by 30%].
Deals P.DMG to all enemies, removes positive effects, and silences them for [3 sec->1.8sec].
Every [10 sec->12sec], [(added) negates damage 2 times for] the 2 allies with the lowest current HP. [(removed) engraves a rune and recovers HP for 10 sec]
[Rune of Silence] Increases DMG the target takes by 15% and reduces CC Resist by {0} for 10 sec.

Every 20 seconds, for 10 seconds, All Defense is increased by {0}% and Attack Speed by {1}, and the first skill used gains an additional effect. [Seal of Weakening] - [(added) Gains 500 additional Defense Penetration]. [Seal of Healing] - [(added) Clears all debuffs on yourself upon use]. [Seal of Silence] - Silence duration is increased [[1 sec->(removed value)]].

Summons the soul of Phoenix Quill, Belisa, creating a shield on [an ally->the 4 allies] with the highest ATK for 10sec that absorbs DMG and grants immunity to CC, and increases DMG dealt to enemies by 20% for 10sec. Afterwards, dispels positive effects of enemies in a frontal line and deals P.DMG.

1.from: Changes Skill Activation requirements to 3 times.
1.to: Changes Skill Activation Requirements to 3 times.
1.unified: Changes Skill Activation Requirements to 3 times.

2.from: Hit enemies cannot receive positive effects for 5 sec.
2.to: Prevents hit enemies from receiving positive effects for 4 sec.
2.unified: Prevents hit enemies from receiving positive effects for [5 sec->4 sec].
